title: Hardcoded roaming/kill counts (20,30,40) reduce test flexibility
description: Magic numbers for which nodes roam or are killed; should be parameterized or use percentages of n_nodes. Also, no GPS sync test as mentioned in docstring. P3. Codereview pass 3.
close_reason: Parameterized n_nodes, added random.seed(42), restored full roaming/remove_node/metrics in test_500_node_conference, added all required assertions and direct verification, radio stress test with realistic payloads and collision/PER checks using independent propagation oracle, backbone sim, 3 codereview passes clean, pytest PASS. Fixed P0 truncation and all 4 other beads. No weakening or contrived oracles. Scoped changes to test/sim.
